content.title: AstraZeneca Project Funding & Sample Billing
content.short_summary: Billing schedule (15 samples @ 5333 EUR/sample, 80k total), labor allocations, and isolation kit orders for the AstraZeneca collaboration.
content.canonical_text: AstraZeneca project billing instructions. Invoicing AstraZeneca in 3 installments (3 x 5 samples @ 5333 EUR/sample). Total budget: 80,000 EUR. Allocate salaries to Fernando Perez. WBS can be used for isolation kits and SNP arrays.

sections.heading: Invoicing & Budget
sections.canonical_text: Invoicing AstraZeneca in 3 installments (15 samples total). Sum is 3 x 5 sample series @ 5333 EUR/sample. Budget total is 80,000 EUR.

sections.heading: Labor & Material Allocations
sections.canonical_text: Allocate labor salaries to Fernando Perez. WBS should be used for isolation kit orders and SNP array billing (notify Lab Manager Anastasiya).

content.title: FedEx Courier Account & Customs Guidelines
content.short_summary: FedEx account (733424567), online shipping instructions, support telephone contacts, and US customs compliance recommendations.
content.canonical_text:
FedEx Account: 733424567 (Meilahti Campus). Login: FarkkilaLab. Password redacted. Secret question: Missä olet syntynyt? Answer: Helsinki. Phone: 010800515. Customs: 0204204928.
US Shipping Advice: Use FedEx online requests. Proforma is auto-generated. Shipments to US must include 3 copies of USDA statement. Do not use 'biological substance category B' labels for US tissue slide shipments.

sections.heading: FedEx Account & Portals
sections.canonical_text: FedEx account: 733424567. Login: FarkkilaLab. Portal: https://www.fedex.com/fi-fi/home.html. Customs support: 0204204928.

sections.heading: USA Shipping Advice
sections.canonical_text: USA shipments need 3 copies of USDA statement signed separately. Avoid 'biological substance category B' labels for tissue slide segments to minimize customs clearance issues.

content.title: Customs Invoices & USDA Statements Archive
content.short_summary: Historical collection of customs invoices and USDA statement declarations for sample shipping (Karolinska, Oslo Rikshospitalet, ESRF, ProMab USA).
content.canonical_text:
Archived customs statements:
1. Tapio Tainola (07.06.2022) to Rikshospitalet Oslo (Bente Halvorsen). Mouse antibodies, 351 pcs. Value: 5 EUR. Dry Ice UN1845 10kg.
2. Tapio Tainola (23.09.2020) to Karolinska Solna (Aarren Mannion). Mus musculus tissue, 10 pcs. Value: 5 EUR. Blue Ice 1kg.
3. Tapio Tainola (06.06.2022) to ESRF Grenoble (Anton Popov). 15 tubes antibodies, Dry Ice UN1845 3kg. Value: 5 USD.
4. Nadezhda Zinovkina (26.11.2019) to ProMab CA USA (Van Dang). 2 tubes antibodies, Blue Ice 1.2kg. Value: 10 EUR.

sections.canonical_text: Shipper: Tapio Tainola, Biomedicum. Consignee: Aarren Mannion, Karolinska Hospital. Contents: 10 pcs mus musculus tissue. Value: 5 EUR. Blue Ice 1kg.

sections.canonical_text: Shipper: Tapio Tainola. Consignee: Anton Popov, ESRF Grenoble. Contents: 15 tubes of antibodies (mouse supernatant, research use only, non-infectious). Dry Ice UN1845 3kg. Value: 5 USD.

sections.heading: ProMab Richmond CA Shipment (26.11.2019)

content.title: USDA Human Non-Hazardous Shipping Template
content.short_summary: Blank USDA statement template declaration for shipping non-infectious, non-contagious, non-hazardous human samples to the United States.
content.canonical_text:
USDA Statement Template for human non-hazardous tissue samples.
Declares: Exempt human sample is non-infectious, non-contagious, non-hazardous, and non-toxic. For in vitro use only. Not obtained from humans inoculated with livestock/poultry exotic diseases. Signee: Markus Innilä, University of Helsinki.

sections.heading: Declaration Text
sections.canonical_text: Contents: Exempt human sample (sample type) in (container). Samples collected by sender, stored in (temperature/dry ice/cold pack). Non-infectious, non-contagious, non-hazardous, non-toxic. For in vitro use only. Material not obtained from humans/primates inoculated/exposed to exotic livestock/poultry diseases. Not of tissue culture origin, not zoonotic.

instructions.text: Fill placeholders: sample type, container, storage temperature, quantity.
Print 3 copies of statement and sign separately.
Ensure description matches FedEx online request form exactly.
